top_findings.title: No README.md with setup and run instructions
top_findings.evidence: run_dir has no README.md (ls README* -> no matches); _agent_stdout.log shows write_file was sandbox-blocked ('Refusing to write to sensitive system path') so the agent never produced it
top_findings.suggestion: Add a README.md documenting go build / go run, PORT and DATABASE_PATH env vars, and the endpoint list
